title: July 30
content:
<noinclude>{{Top|real|nocat=1}}
{{Month|July}}

'''July 30''' is the 211th day (212th in leap years) of the year, with 154 days remaining.</noinclude>

*[[1930s#1938|1938]] – [[Michael Bell]] is born.
*[[1940s#1948|1948]] – [[Carel Struycken]] is born.
*[[1950s#1957|1957]] – [[Victor Slezak]] is born.
*[[1971]] – Founding of [[Nelvana]].
*[[1997]] – [[Dark Force Rising 3|''Dark Force Rising'' 3]] published.
*[[2002]] – ''[[The New Jedi Order: Traitor]]'' published.
*[[2003]] – [[Republic 56|''Republic'' 56]] published.
*[[2008]] – [[Rebellion 15|''Rebellion'' 15]] published.
*[[2010]] – ''[[The Old Republic, Blood of the Empire Act 2: The Broken World]]'' finishes publishing [http://www.swtor.com online].
*[[2014]] – [[Rebel Heist 4|''Rebel Heist'' 4]] published.
*[[2015]] – ''[[Star Wars Rebels Annual 2016]]'' published.
*2015 – ''[[Star Wars Rebels: Transfer Activity Book]]'' published.
*2015 – ''[[Star Wars: Force and Destiny Core Rulebook]]'' released.
*[[2017]] – "[[The Stranger (episode)|The Stranger]]" first airs on [[Disney Channel]].
*2017 – "[[Bounty of Trouble]]" first airs on [[Disney Channel]].
*[[2021]] – "[[War-Mantle]]" airs on [[Disney+]].
*[[2023]] – [[Paul Reubens]] dies.
*[[2024]] – ''[[Star Wars Legends: Tales of the Jedi Omnibus]]'' published.
*2024 – ''[[Star Wars Modern Era Epic Collection: Skywalker Strikes]]'' published.
*[[2025]] – [[Hyperspace Stories—Tides of Terror 1|''Hyperspace Stories—Tides of Terror'' 1]] published.
*2025 – [[The High Republic – The Finale 1|''The High Republic – The Finale'' 1]] published.
*2025 – ''[[The Star Wars Archives: Episodes I–VI, 1977–2005]]'' published.
<noinclude>
